message:
fix: add --user flag to docker exec commands for remoteUser support

The remoteUser field from devcontainer.json was being parsed and used
for mount paths, but was not being passed to docker run or docker exec
commands. This caused containers to always run as root regardless of
the remoteUser setting.

Changes:
- Add --user flag to docker run command when remoteUser is specified
- Add --user flag to docker exec in both new container and reconnect code paths
- Add postStart command execution to reconnect path for consistency

Fixes:
- TestE2E_RemoteUser now passes
- TestE2E_FullDevcontainer now passes

All E2E tests passing (28 tests).
